description: Title and Registration processing — enforces title application deadlines, temp tag expiration, lien perfection, odometer disclosure, and out-of-state requirements; tracks processing times and payoff status

hard_stops.logic: workspace must be initialized before any title and registration operation
AI-generated title tracking is decision-support only — title clerks must verify all submissions with state DMV requirements
title, registration, and lien data must be accurate — errors cause DMV rejections and fines
title application must be submitted within the state-mandated deadline after sale — FINES ESCALATE daily and dealer license may be at risk
temporary tag has expired — vehicle cannot legally be driven; dealer may face fines and customer complaints
lienholder's security interest must be perfected (title filed with lien) within the required timeline — unperfected lien exposes lender and dealer
federal odometer disclosure statement required on all title transfers for vehicles under 20 model years — missing disclosure is a federal crime
out-of-state title and registration requirements differ from home state — all destination-state requirements must be met before submission
salvage, rebuilt, or branded title status must be disclosed to the buyer before sale — failure to disclose is fraud

soft_flags.logic: title application is approaching but has not yet exceeded the state-mandated deadline
temporary tag will expire within 7 days and permanent registration has not been received
trade-in payoff has been sent but lien release has not been received from the prior lienholder
DMV has rejected a title application — correction and resubmission required
trade-in payoff has not been sent within the contracted timeline
